## Type of change

- [ ] New guide
- [ ] Correction / accuracy fix
- [ ] Improvement to an existing guide
- [ ] New topic folder (band)
- [ ] Repo/meta (templates, scripts, README)

## Checklist

- [ ] Filename follows `NN-kebab-case.md` and uses the **next free number** in the folder.
- [ ] I did **not** renumber or rename any existing guide (no broken inbound links).
- [ ] The guide has an H1 title and a "Where this sits" callout (and a ToC if long).
- [ ] Strong claims are anchored to a source, derivation, or repo code.
- [ ] Math (`$...$` / `$$...$$`) and code fences render correctly.
- [ ] I added a row for the guide to [`01-mastery-curriculum.md`](../01-mastery-curriculum.md).
- [ ] Relative links resolve; no secrets or export-controlled detail.
